untranslatable_reason: Complex Head-and-Shoulders Bottom requires pattern recognition of multiple shoulders/heads and neckline slope geometry. These structural elements (shoulder count, head configuration, neckline downslope) cannot be expressed through available point-in-time indicators. Volume shape preferences (rising trend, random shape) also require multi-bar analysis beyond single-bar volume ratios. Approximation provided uses breakout above DC, heavy volume confirmation, oversold conditions, and lack of nearby resistance as proxies.
